hero.title: We know what we’re doing.
hero.body: We build systems, run experiments, and deploy operations for people who need sharp execution without theater. Precision-forward, technologically astute, and a little mischievous.

about.title: Who we are
paragraphs: We are a deliberately vague corporation with a very specific skill set: turning messy ideas into clear systems, useful tools, and quietly effective outcomes.
Part lab, part operator, part holding company for unreasonable projects. We move fast, stay precise, and keep the joke just subtle enough to trust us with serious work.

initiatives.title: What we do
initiatives.body: Three core lanes. One operating style: clear thinking, strong execution, and systems built to hold up when the brief gets weird.

items.title: Engineering
items.body: We design and ship durable technical systems, internal tools, automations, and infrastructure that keep working after the demo ends.

items.title: Research
items.body: We investigate markets, signals, workflows, and edge cases until ambiguity becomes direction and decisions stop relying on guesswork.

items.title: Consulting
items.body: Advisory support for sensitive initiatives, strategic planning, and executive-level problem solving with the same deliberate operational edge.

agents.title: The agents
agents.body: A covert collective of specialists operating at the intersection of strategy, engineering, research, and influence—built to turn ambitious ideas into real-world outcomes with precision, speed, and just the right amount of menace.

items.name: Number 2
items.body: Runs point on operations, translates rough requests into actual plans, and keeps moving parts aligned when the mission starts to sprawl.

items.name: Dexter
items.body: Builds the machinery. Ships code, fixes problems, and turns technical intent into stable systems with minimal drama.

items.name: Albert
items.body: Finds the signal, organizes the evidence, and turns sprawling inputs into briefings that are actually useful.

items.name: Sherlock
items.body: Handles deep investigation, pattern tracing, and inconvenient questions before bad assumptions become expensive ones.

items.name: Iris
items.body: Shapes the interface, sharpens the visual system, and makes sure the experience looks as controlled as the operation behind it.

items.name: Jimmy
items.body: Turns strategy into attention. Messaging, positioning, launch angles, and campaign hooks designed to get noticed and acted on.

items.name: Pepper
items.body: Owns the inbox, the calendar, and every document that matters. Nothing gets scheduled, filed, or sent without her knowing about it first.

items.name: N.O.A.H.
items.body: Monitors the infrastructure, hardens the systems, and makes sure the whole operation stays running when no one is watching.

contact.title: Open a secure channel
contact.body: Have a project, a sensitive problem, or a brief that needs competent hands? Send the essentials. We’ll route it to the right operator.
contact.fieldNote: Low-volume intake. Briefs are reviewed by humans, agents, or both.
